svg.title: Lorentz force on charged particles in bubble chamber - HD.6D.635_(12000265314)

cc:Work.dc:title: Lorentz force on charged particles in bubble chamber - HD.6D.635_(12000265314)
cc:Work.dc:description: Photograph of liquid hydrogen bubble chamber tracks of charged particles. The magnetic field points downward. Positively and negatively charged particles spiral in opposite directions.
